title: Western Blotting for Neuronal Proteins
author: Mukesh Kumar
materials: Dilute the primary antibodies in LiCor blocking buffer according to the manufacturer’s instructions.
Normalize the protein concentration of all samples.

Capture chemiluminescent signals using the LiCor Odyssey Fc system. •Ensure all steps are performed on ice during protein extraction to prevent protein degradation. •Optimize antibody dilutions and incubation times for specific targets. •Blotting-Grade Blocker (Bio-Rad, 1706404) can be used in place of LiCor blocking buffer. •Handle all reagents and equipment following standard laboratory safety protocols.

steps.title: Isolate neurons from rat pups (P0-1...
steps.instruction: Isolate neurons from rat pups (P0-1 days) and plate them on 35 mm dishes coated with 50 ug/ml poly-D-lysine.

steps.title: Culture the neurons under standard conditions...
steps.instruction: Culture the neurons under standard conditions ( 37 °C , 5% CO₂) and allow them to adhere.

steps.title: At 2 days in vitro (DIV-2),...
steps.instruction: At 2 days in vitro (DIV-2), introduce lentivirus into the culture media at an appropriate multiplicity of infection (MOI) tested previously for individual virus prepared.

steps.title: Incubate the neurons with lentivirus for...
steps.instruction: Incubate the neurons with lentivirus for 48:00:00 - 72:00:00 to ensure efficient transduction.

steps.title: Remove the culture media and rinse...
steps.instruction: Remove the culture media and rinse neurons gently with ice-cold PBS.

steps.title: Add RIPA lysis buffer (supplemented with...
steps.instruction: Add RIPA lysis buffer (supplemented with complete protease inhibitor) to the dish.

steps.title: Scrape the neurons into the lysis...
steps.instruction: Scrape the neurons into the lysis buffer using a cell scraper.

steps.title: Transfer the lysate to a microcentrifuge...
steps.instruction: Transfer the lysate to a microcentrifuge tube and incubate On ice for 00:20:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge the lysate at 14000 rpm,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the lysate at 14000 rpm, 4 °C, 15 minutes to remove debris.

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant (cytosolic protein fraction) to a new tube
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant (cytosolic protein fraction) to a new tube.

steps.title: Measure protein concentration using the BCA...
steps.instruction: Measure protein concentration using the BCA Protein Assay Kit according to the manufacturer’s instructions.

steps.title: Mix equal amounts of protein with...
steps.instruction: Mix equal amounts of protein with SDS sample buffer (2X) and heat at 95 °C for 00:05:00 to denature the proteins.

steps.title: Load the samples onto an SDS-PAGE...
steps.instruction: Load the samples onto an SDS-PAGE gel and run electrophoresis at the appropriate voltage.

steps.title: Transfer the separated proteins onto a...
steps.instruction: Transfer the separated proteins onto a PVDF membrane using a wet transfer system.

steps.title: Block the PVDF membrane in LiCor...
steps.instruction: Block the PVDF membrane in LiCor blocking buffer for 01:00:00 at Room temperature with gentle agitation.

steps.title: Incubate the membrane with the primary...
steps.instruction: Incubate the membrane with the primary antibody Overnight at 4 °C with gentle rocking.

steps.title: Wash the membranes 3 times with...
steps.instruction: Wash the membranes 3 times with TBST (Tris-buffered saline with 0.1% Tween-20), 10 minutes per wash.

steps.title: Dilute HRP-conjugated secondary antibody in LiCor...
steps.instruction: Dilute HRP-conjugated secondary antibody in LiCor blocking buffer and incubate the membrane for 01:00:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Wash the membrane 3 times with...
steps.instruction: Wash the membrane 3 times with TBST, 10 minutes per wash.

steps.title: Apply ECL reagent to the PVDF membrane
steps.instruction: Apply ECL reagent to the PVDF membrane.

steps.title: Wash the membranes with TBST (Tris-buffered saline with 0
steps.instruction: Wash the membranes with TBST (Tris-buffered saline with 0.1% Tween-20) for 00:10:00 (1/3).

steps.title: Wash the membranes with TBST (Tris-buffered saline with 0
steps.instruction: Wash the membranes with TBST (Tris-buffered saline with 0.1% Tween-20) for 00:10:00 (2/3).

steps.title: Wash the membranes with TBST (Tris-buffered saline with 0
steps.instruction: Wash the membranes with TBST (Tris-buffered saline with 0.1% Tween-20) for 00:10:00 (3/3).

steps.title: Wash the membrane with TBST for 00:10:00 (1/3)
steps.instruction: Wash the membrane with TBST for 00:10:00 (1/3).

steps.title: Wash the membrane with TBST for 00:10:00 (2/3)
steps.instruction: Wash the membrane with TBST for 00:10:00 (2/3).

steps.title: Wash the membrane with TBST for 00:10:00 (3/3)
steps.instruction: Wash the membrane with TBST for 00:10:00 (3/3).
